data: {"generalSituation":"Tropical Cyclone Bavi will move across eastern China and weaken gradually today and tomorrow. Its outer subsiding air will continue to bring generally fine and extremely hot weather to Guangdong today. High temperatures may also trigger showers. A broad trough of low pressure is expected to bring unsettled weather to the northern part of the South China Sea and the coast of southern China in the following few days. There will be showers and thunderstorms over the region.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260712","week":"Sunday","forecastWind":"Southwest force 4.","forecastWeather":"Fine.
